title: Dekton 4 Digit Combination Key Safe Box (120 X 90 X 40mm)-measures 120 X 90 X 40mm| Enables Storage Of Up To 5 Keys| Can Be Fixed On Wall Or Fixed Object| Ideal For Estate Agents, Equipment Storage
features: Compact and Secure Design (120 X 90 X 40mm): The Dekton 4-Digit Combination Key Safe Box is designed with dimensions of 120 x 90 x 40 mm, making it compact enough to fit discreetly on any wall or fixed object while still providing ample space for secure key storage.

Holds Up to 5 Keys: This key safe box is engineered to accommodate up to 5 standard-sized keys, making it ideal for various applications. Whether you need to securely store spare keys for your home, office, or equipment, this box offers a practical and organized solution to ensure your keys are always within reach but secure from unauthorized access.

4-Digit Combination Lock for Enhanced Security: The key safe box features a 4-digit combination lock, providing a high level of security for your keys. With over 10,000 possible combinations, you can easily set a unique code to protect your keys from unauthorized access.

Ideal for Estate Agents and Equipment Storage: This key safe box is particularly useful for estate agents who need to provide secure access to properties or for storing equipment keys in a shared environment. Its robust design and secure locking mechanism make it a reliable choice for professionals who require dependable key management solutions.

Durable and Weather-Resistant Construction: Built to withstand various environmental conditions, the Dekton Key Safe Box is crafted from durable materials designed to resist wear and tear. Its weather-resistant properties ensure that it remains functional and reliable, even in outdoor settings exposed to the elements.
description: The Dekton 4 Digit Combination Key Safe Box is an essential security solution for safeguarding your keys and small valuables. Measuring 120 x 90 x 40mm, this compact yet sturdy safe is designed to securely store up to five keys, making it an ideal choice for estate agents, equipment storage, and other applications where easy access and security are paramount. Constructed from high-quality materials, the key safe box features a robust design that offers excellent resistance to tampering and unauthorized access. The 4-digit combination lock provides a secure and customizable access code, allowing you to set a combination that is both easy for you to remember and difficult for others to guess. The combination mechanism is straightforward to operate, ensuring quick and hassle-free access while maintaining high security. Versatility is a key feature of this key safe box. It can be easily fixed to a wall or any other sturdy object, providing flexible installation options to suit your needs. Whether you're managing properties, storing important equipment, or need a secure location for spare keys, this safe box offers reliable protection and convenient access. The installation process is simple, and the included mounting hardware ensures that the safe can be securely attached for peace of mind. The Dekton 4 Digit Combination Key Safe Box is designed to withstand the elements, making it suitable for both indoor and outdoor use.
